signals.headline: RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed Across XRPL and Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed Across XRPL and Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The official full-scale rollout of Ripple USD (RLUSD) stablecoin on the XRP Ledger and Ethereum has been confirmed as of April 18, 2026, driving massive capital influx and record XRPL transaction volume amid heightened institutional adoption.[1]

signals.headline: SEC Legal Battle Officially Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Legal Battle Officially Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ripple's long-standing SEC lawsuit is now fully resolved ("in the rearview mirror"), clearing a major regulatory hurdle and boosting confidence with XRP ETF approvals in final stages and six active U.S. spot XRP ETFs holding ~$1B AUM.[1][3]

signals.headline: Rakuten Wallet Launch Goes Live on XRPL | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Rakuten Wallet Launch Goes Live on XRPL | YES | MED confidence**  
Rakuten Wallet launched on April 15, 2026, coinciding with XRP's first 2026 breach above $1.50 (intraday high $1.51094 on April 17), supported by spot ETF inflows preceding futures activity.[3]
